title: SSA FY2025 Performance Results Overview — Extracted Text
description: Markdown text extracted from SSA's 'Overview of Our Fiscal Year 2025 Performance Results' (the Agency Financial Report's management discussion of FY2025 results): three strategic focus areas (improve customer service; fight fraud and waste; optimize and empower the workforce), FY2025 operating expenses by focus area, and summary performance data. A summary document pending the final FY2025 APR expected March 2026.

source.title: Overview of Our Fiscal Year 2025 Performance Results
source.url: https://www.ssa.gov/finance/2025/Overview of Our Fiscal Year 2025 Performance Results.pdf

notes: Computed: text extracted via Firecrawl from the published FY25 performance-results overview PDF (~22 KB markdown); narrative summary, not a tidy machine table, so no per-column schema. Source URL is the exact PDF from apr-fy25.source.txt (note the spaces in the SSA-published filename). Per the document, the final FY2025 APR with actual results is expected on SSA's website in March 2026.
